? Spettro Magazine: Vol 1 | Print Ready

"Superior chemical engineering should be the industry standard, not a luxury."

Designed in Germany. Manufactured in Tashkent.

REGINA DI COLOR TASHKENT, UZ EST. 2021
TECHNICAL REPORT

THE FUTURE OF INFRASTRUCTURE:
2K BIO-PU ROAD MARKING

SUSTAINABILITY 0% VOC

A silent revolution in safety. While traditional road paints contain up to 40% solvents, Spettro 2K Bio-PU utilizes a 100% solid content formulation. Zero Volatile Organic Compounds. Zero heavy metals.

ENGINEERING

Developed in collaboration with Münzing Chemie GmbH and the Tashkent Chemical-Technological Institute.

Our formula is engineered specifically for the extreme thermal cycles of Central Asia, resisting softening at +60°C and cracking at -20°C.

THE TRIAL: AMIR TEMUR AVENUE

Tested under the heaviest traffic load in the capital. Verified by independent monitoring to exceed Class 2 durability standards. The only road marking system in Uzbekistan certified to ISO 9001:2015 standards for molecular adhesion on active asphalt.

Application: Spettro 2K Bio-PU on Asphalt

PAINTS: INTERIOR & UNIVERSAL

VOL. 1

VISO

PREMIUM INTERIOR ACRYLIC

Experience the purest finish designed for modern living. UV-Resistant formula suitable for metal, glass, wood, plastic, brick, and concrete.

Density1.42 g/cm³
GlossMatte/Satin
SurfacesConcrete, Wood
FeatureUV-Resistant

BIANCO

PREMIUM UNIVERSAL GRADE

A universal acrylic paint with high whiteness and durability. Ideal for both interior and exterior applications on various substrates.

Density1.50 g/cm³
GlossMatte/Satin
ApplicationInt/Ext
FeatureHigh Whiteness

CELESTE

UV-RESISTANT LATEX

High-performance latex paint offering excellent coverage and UV resistance. Dries in just 4 hours.

BaseLatex
ElasticityHigh Flex
Dry Time4 Hours
Washability>5000 Cycles

PAINTS: ENAMELS & DECOR

VOL. 2

PERLA

UNIVERSAL ENAMEL

Universal Acrylic Urethane Enamel with a wide range of gloss levels up to 70%. Highly resistant to UV and wear.

BaseAcrylic Urethane
FinishSatin-Gloss
AdhesionMulti-Surface
HardnessHB Pencil

MAESTRO

PROFESSIONAL ENAMEL

Professional grade Universal Acrylic Urethane Enamel. Balanced density and consumption for optimal application.

BasePoly Urethane
Solids52% Volume
FlowSuperior
GradeIndustrial

SOFIA

DECORATIVE FINISH

An innovative polyurethane decorative coating featuring a distinctive soft-touch finish. Highly decorative and engineered for premium aesthetic applications.

BaseVinyl Copolymer
TextureSoft Touch
ApplicationTrowel
EffectOttocento

PRIMER

DEEP PENETRATION SYSTEM

Nano-tech primer with 50nm particle size for deep penetration (8mm). Suitable for plaster, brick, concrete, and drywall. Essential for consolidating porous surfaces before painting.

SPECS
  • Density 1.00 g/cm³
  • Consumption 100 g/m²
  • Particle Size 50 nm
  • Penetration 8 mm
TECH

CERAMIC PLASTER

STRUCTURAL INTEGRITY

Acrylic-urethane decorative coating serving as a robust alternative to fiberglass mesh. Engineered for high elasticity, crack resistance, and extreme whiteness (97 CIELAB).

**RU**: Акрилово-уретановое декоративное покрытие. Эластичная альтернатива стеклосетке.

SPECS
  • Density 1.55 g/cm³
  • Elasticity High
  • Base Acrylic+Marble
  • Whiteness 97%
